results.rendered_html:
pruth cl. 1. P. Ā. prothati, ˚te, to pant, neigh, snort (as a horse),  RV. ;  ĀśvŚr.  :
Caus. prothayati, to employ force,  Āpast.  :
Intens. (only p. popruthat) to snort aloud,  RV. i, 30, 16  (cf. √proth).

results.rendered_html:
pruth , proth
1〉 prothati pusten (vom Ross), schnauben: prothadaśvo na yavase 'viṣyan  ṚV. 7,3,2 . induṃ prothantaṃ pravapantamarṇavam 10,115,3 . med. 2. iti prothya prathamena praṣṭhīvanti pragirantyuttarābhyām  ĀŚV. ŚR. 6,13 . intens. partic. poprathat  ṚV. 1,30,16 .
— 2〉 proth, prothati, ˚te Jmd (dat. gen.) gewachsen sein  DHĀTUP. 21,6 . puprothāsmai na kaśca na  BHAṬṬ. 14,84 . nāprothīdasya kaśca na 15,40 .
— 3〉 proth, prothati voll sein  GOVINDABH. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— Vgl. protha.
— apa wegschnauben, wegblasen: apa protha dundubhe ducchunā itaḥ  ṚV. 6,47,30 . 9,98,11 .
— pra = simpl. 1.: prapruthyā śipre maghavannṛjīṣinvimucyā harī iha mādayasva  ṚV. 3,32,1 .  TS. 7,1,19,1 .  PAÑCAV. BR. 8,4,1 . 18,9,11 , wo der Comm. es auf das geräuschvolle Schütteln der Glieder des Rosses bezieht.
— Vgl. praprotha.
